metadata.title: GitHub#12543: maintenance of differentiated cell state
metadata.comment:
The mRNA target constructs in this paper are from mouse, therefore mouse IDs have been used. 
The annotated mouse miRs are identical to their human orthologues with one small exception:
hsa-miR-155-5p (URS0000338542_9606) and mmu-miR-155-5p (URS0000021B51_10090) are 95.7% identical, differing only in nucleotide 12 (C in human vs. U in mouse). Importantly, both species of this miR-155-5p have 100% identical seed sequences (UAAUGC).
